recentTweets.text:
Over 600,000 kids are going without meals this summer because Indiana opted out of a federal food program. My bill would change that. 

Learn more about my Summer Meals for Kids Act: https://t.co/TNs7vOcqAj https://t.co/jiwApFBmfB

After President Trump promised to end the war he started with Iran, he is dragging us back into an unauthorized and unnecessary war. Working families are already struggling with the cost of living. Now they will face even higher gas prices because of his reckless decision.

My annual job fair is coming up! If you want to attend, no pre-registration is required. If you’re an employer or organization looking to participate, you can sign up here: https://t.co/H94AZvtMpW https://t.co/LL0n1eJtwI

Families with Temporary Protected Status (TPS) from Syria, Somalia, South Sudan, Haiti, Yemen, and Ethiopia could lose their work permits as soon as July 10. 
 
If you or someone you know is impacted, I have a list of local legal service providers and Know Your Rights resources

Indianapolis is home to some incredible young artists, and I am proud to recognize this year's Congressional Art Competition winner, Teagan H. Her artwork will now be displayed in the halls of Congress for visitors from across the country to see. https://t.co/EIdYblua00

President Trump is holding critical legislation hostage in an effort to pass the SAVE Act that disenfranchises millions of eligible voters. We should be focused on lowering costs, expanding housing, and protecting the right for every eligible American to vote. https://t.co/kjzovQMY02

I'm supporting a nationwide pause on all new AI data centers until safeguards are put in place — protecting union jobs and your energy bill. 

I also introduced my Data Center Transparency Act to make sure neighborhood feedback is central. 

In Irvington, residents continue to

The Supreme Court just affirmed a fundamental principle of our country: if you are born in America, you are American. 

We are trying to create a more perfect union every day—where everyone is included.

Central Indiana is currently under a heat advisory. As we see a rise in extreme weather events, it’s a reminder of how ongoing environmental changes fuel these dangerous conditions.

Stay cool, check on your neighbors, and look out for one another. 

https://t.co/kAYIj8QuuB

Trump's cuts to USAID have already caused hundreds of thousands of preventable deaths. That's why I offered 7 amendments to restore America's humanitarian leadership, strengthen our economy, and protect our national security. What happens around the world impacts us all. https://t.co/pnwYrs6G1l

I chaired the first open hearing on UAPs—Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena—4 years ago. At the time, UAPs were disregarded as science fiction. Today, some of the nation’s leading experts in policy, research, and science are engaged in serious conversations about transparency and https://t.co/kNte0S4hJa

This week, I helped pass a bill to expand affordable housing. It’s ready for Trump to sign—but he won’t.

To every father and father figure, thank you for inspiring us and shaping our communities. Happy Father's Day!

AES is raising its rates for Indy residents for the second time in 2 years. 
 
There's no reason a company generating $12 billion in revenue per year should be able to raise costs for families making $12 an hour. 
 
Hoosiers deserve better. 
https://t.co/HyWSMctrQU

I am calling on DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin to close the Dilley Immigration Processing Center. Families have reported inhumane treatment and unsafe conditions for children. No child belongs in detention. DHS must close this facility and end family detention. https://t.co/3dLILTSJXw

This is exactly why we need to end Trump's war in Iran: inflation, energy costs, gas prices, and fuel oil are all skyrocketing. 
 
The House passed a War Powers Resolution last week to end Trump's Iran war. Now the Senate needs to act to give families some relief.
RT @FOX59: A new bill proposed by U.S. Rep. André Carson, D-Ind. District 7 aims to ensure that children have access to food during the sum…

🚨NEW BILL ALERT:

Indiana opted out of a food program that provides summer meals for 650,000 kids. My Summer Meals for Kids Act would prevent states from needlessly cutting resources—and ensure every child is fed, all year round. 
 
Learn more: https://t.co/9OUv2ZkvGw

Throughout our history, Caribbean Americans have served our country and contributed to the culture of the United States through the arts, science, education, business, sports, military, and government. I was proud to introduce a resolution recognizing the significance of National https://t.co/lgdEULCk6u

NEW: I just signed a discharge petition to fast track a vote on the Right to Contraception Act.

8 in 10 Americans—of both parties—support protecting access to birth control. But a few extremist lawmakers could threaten this critical health care. 

I'm taking action.
RT @D4CWA: Thank you @RepAndreCarson for meeting with @CWAUnion D4 members. Your thoughtful engagement on AI, the future of work, & the cha…

In Indiana, the average cost of living under this administration has risen more than $2,200. 

What are Republicans doing about it? Spending even more of your tax dollars on ICE and Border Patrol.

I won't support legislation that funds ICE and leaves families hurting.
RT @RepJohnLarson: It is shameful for my Republican colleagues to launch an anti-Muslim caucus. They are pushing discriminatory legislation…

I led 119 of my colleagues in condemning Anti-Muslim discrimination and defending the constitutional rights of American Muslims. Anti Muslim discrimination is wrong and we must defend the constitutional rights of American Muslims. Religious freedom belongs to every American.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for André Carson. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy, Syria / Rojava.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-07T19:02:49Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
